section_name: Applicability of Public Improvement Financing Law
text:
For purposes of Chapter 1371 (Obligations for Certain Public Improvements) , Government Code:

(1) a district is an issuer; and

(2) the acquisition, improvement, or repair of rail facilities by a district is an eligible project.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 172. Rural Rail Transp. Districts
##### § 172.304 — Applicability of Public Improvement Financing Law

For purposes of Chapter 1371 (Obligations for Certain Public Improvements) , Government Code:

(1) a district is an issuer; and

(2) the acquisition, improvement, or repair of rail facilities by a district is an eligible project.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: For purposes of Chapter 1371 (Obligations for Certain Public Improvements) , Government Code:

the acquisition, improvement, or repair of rail facilities by a district is an eligible project.
